titles.text: Kids Station: Oja Majo Doremi Dokkan! Maho-dou Eigo Festival
キッズステーション おジャ魔女どれみドッカーン! Maho 堂えいごフェスティバル

descriptions.text: Ojamajo Doremi Dokkan: Maho-Dou Eigo Festival was the third Ojamajo Doremi video game https://. Like the previous games before it, it had been intended for children and was labeled as a Learning Game.
